parameters.query: WITH candidates AS (SELECT dl.id AS dl_id, dl.event_id, e.event_type, e.payload FROM dead_letter dl JOIN events e ON e.id = dl.event_id WHERE dl.resolved = false AND dl.pipeline = 'stale_lease_recovery' AND dl.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '5 minutes'), classified AS (SELECT c.dl_id, c.event_id, c.event_type, CASE WHEN c.event_type = 'email.received' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM emails em WHERE em.gmail_message_id = c.payload->>'gmail_message_id') THEN 'recovered_email' WHEN c.event_type = 'invoice.detected' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM invoices iv WHERE iv.event_id = c.event_id) THEN 'recovered_invoice' WHEN c.event_type = 'accommodation.report.detected' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM accommodation_daily ad WHERE ad.email_id = (c.payload->>'email_id')::bigint OR ad.source_event_id = c.event_id) THEN 'recovered_accom' WHEN c.event_type = 'epos.report.detected' AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM epos_daily ed WHERE ed.email_id = (c.payload->>'email_id')::bigint OR ed.source_event_id = c.event_id) THEN 'recovered_epos' ELSE NULL END AS verdict FROM candidates c), updated AS (UPDATE dead_letter dl SET resolved = true, resolved_at = NOW(), resolution_notes = 'auto-swept by dead-letter-sweeper-v1: downstream data present (' || cl.verdict || ')' FROM classified cl WHERE dl.id = cl.dl_id AND cl.verdict IS NOT NULL RETURNING dl.id, dl.event_id), event_fix AS (UPDATE events e SET status = 'processed', processed_at = COALESCE(e.processed_at, NOW()) FROM updated u WHERE e.id = u.event_id AND e.status = 'failed' RETURNING e.id), audit_write AS (INSERT INTO audit_log (pipeline, event_id, action, ai_parsed, result) SELECT 'dead-letter-sweeper-v1', u.event_id, 'auto_resolved_dead_letter', jsonb_build_object('reason', 'downstream_data_present'), 'success' FROM updated u RETURNING 1) SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM updated) AS swept_count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM event_fix) AS event_status_fixed;

parameters.name: text
parameters.value: ={{ '🧹 Dead-letter sweeper auto-resolved ' + ($('Sweep false positives').first().json.swept_count || 0) + ' false positive(s) — downstream data was already present. Event status fixed: ' + ($('Sweep false positives').first().json.event_status_fixed || 0) }}
